title: GOAL: Verify Happy Path End-to-End
description: OUTCOME: Confirm entire system works from lead creation → appointment booking → rep notification → win. Proves 80% of system functionality.
action_steps: 1. Create test lead in GHL (New Lead stage)
2. Verify: SMS within 60s
3. Verify: VAPI call within 2 min
4. Answer call, book appointment (provide time)
5. Verify: Appointment created in GHL
6. Verify: Rep SMS notification received
7. Verify: Lead confirmation SMS received
8. Rep marks contact as Showed
9. Rep marks contact as Won
10. Verify: All workflows stop, tags applied

title: GOAL: Verify Stop Conditions Work
description: OUTCOME: Confirm system respects safety limits and won't become spam bot. Critical for TCPA compliance.
action_steps: 1. MAX CALLS: Create lead, let all calls go to voicemail, verify stops at 13 calls over 7 days
2. AFTER HOURS: Create lead at 9 PM, verify no call until 8 AM next day
3. DND FLAG: Mark test lead DND, verify zero calls/SMS
4. REPLY STOPS NURTURE: Reply to nurture SMS, verify sequence stops immediately

title: GOAL: Verify No-Show Recovery Works
description: OUTCOME: Confirm system can recover no-show appointments (recoverable revenue). Tests second-chance mechanism.
action_steps: 1. Use lead from Goal 1 (or create new)
2. Book appointment
3. Rep marks as No Show
4. Verify: No-show SMS within 5 min (empathetic tone)
5. Verify: VAPI recovery call from Sarah No-Show
6. Answer call, rebook appointment
7. Verify: 7-day cadence STOPS when rebooked
8. Verify: New appointment created

title: GOAL: Verify Error Handling Is Graceful
description: OUTCOME: Confirm system handles bad data and failures without breaking. Real-world data is messy.
action_steps: 1. BAD PHONE: Create lead with invalid phone number
2. Verify: System logs error, doesn't retry forever
3. CALL DROP: Answer VAPI call, hang up mid-conversation
4. Verify: Marked as incomplete, re-enters retry queue
5. ERROR NOTIFICATION: Intentionally break workflow (disable node)
6. Verify: You receive error notification (email/SMS/Slack)
7. NOTE: If no error notification exists, CREATE one (gap found)

title: GOAL: Verify Timezone Handling
description: OUTCOME: Confirm business hours enforcement uses correct timezone and works for any client location.
action_steps: 1. Verify n8n has LOCATION_TIMEZONE env var set
2. Test current timezone (EST): Create lead at 7:30 AM, verify no call until 8 AM
3. Test timezone change: Set LOCATION_TIMEZONE=America/Los_Angeles
4. Create lead at 11:30 AM EST (8:30 AM PST), verify call respects PST hours
5. Verify: All 38+ timezone nodes use dynamic variable
6. Reset to America/New_York

title: GOAL: Verify Inbound SMS Handling
description: OUTCOME: Confirm system correctly classifies and responds to inbound messages. Tests conversational intelligence.
action_steps: 1. PRICING: Send SMS "What's the price for inspection?"
2. Verify: Appropriate response, contact tagged engaged
3. BOOKING: Send SMS "Can I book for Tuesday 2pm?"
4. Verify: Booking link or appointment created
5. OPT-OUT: Send SMS "Stop texting me"
6. Verify: Removed from all sequences, no further messages
7. AMBIGUOUS: Send SMS "Maybe" or thumbs up emoji
8. Verify: Clarifying question OR routed to rep

title: GOAL: Verify Stage Transitions Work
description: OUTCOME: Confirm GHL stage changes trigger correct workflows and state updates. Tests automation wiring.
action_steps: 1. SHOWED: Move contact to Showed stage, verify tag applied
2. WON: Move contact to Won stage, verify all outreach stops
3. LOST: Move contact to Lost stage, verify clean exit from workflows
4. NO-SHOW: Already tested in Goal 3

title: GOAL: Verify System Can Handle Volume
description: OUTCOME: Confirm system handles concurrent leads without webhook backup or call collisions. Tests scalability.
action_steps: 1. Create 5 test leads within 1 minute
2. Verify: All 5 processed (webhooks fired)
3. Verify: No duplicate actions
4. Verify: VAPI doesn't call all 5 simultaneously
5. Verify: n8n handles concurrency (check execution logs)
6. Note: Self-hosted n8n = unlimited executions
